observed_gaps.description: Multi-ID traceability markers on one line (`// wingman:req ARCH-002 ARCH-003`) silently drop all but the first ID — check-traceability.mjs's regex captures exactly one ID per `wingman:req` occurrence, and traceability-linking's docs never specified the required syntax.
observed_gaps.evidence: check-traceability.mjs reported ARCH-003 as an unlinked requirement despite a marker visibly referencing it; splitting into two separate `// wingman:req <ID>` lines resolved it.

observed_gaps.description: Boardroom diff-checkpoints are not deterministic across repeated dispatches of near-identical scope, with real consequences — Build's checkpoint returned a clean 8/8 GO, then Ship's own re-dispatch of the same personas over almost the same diff caught two substantive findings (a latent NODE_ENV-gated backdoor, a missing production write path) that Build's pass hadn't raised. Not wrong behavior, but nothing set the expectation that a cleared checkpoint could be relitigated later.
observed_gaps.evidence: .wingman/checkpoints.jsonl entries 2026-07-15T01:21:30Z-build (all GO) vs. 2026-07-15T01:26:00Z-ship (cto/ciso raised new concerns)

shortcuts_disclosed: This sandbox's Agent tool cannot dynamically dispatch named dept-*/boardroom-* subagent types (confirmed: 'Agent type not found') — every dispatch used a general-purpose agent explicitly loaded with the real persona file.
AskUserQuestion tool unavailable in this sandbox (confirmed via ToolSearch) — founder decisions made as explicit stood-in reasoning.
git push skipped — fixture has no configured remote.
classification_outcome: 4 gaps classified via dogfood-gap-classification and approved: (1) traceability-linking SKILL.md doc fix (skill-content addition), (2) boardroom.md re-litigation-expectation doc fix (command-instruction addition), (3) define/architecture/uxflow.md output-file convention (command-instruction addition), (4) management-board-activation creation/dispatch decoupling (skill-logic fix). None were hook candidates, so none require cooling-off.
